_meta.source: ICRP Publication 119 (2012), Annex F Table F.1 and Annex G Table G.1
_meta.description: Effective dose coefficients for ingestion and inhalation of particulates for members of the public to 70 years of age. Inhalation values are for AMAD 1 um.
notes: Top-level keys are radionuclides matched to the workers dataset.
Ingestion entries store infant and 1-year f1 values plus dose coefficients for infant, 1 year, 5 years, 10 years, 15 years, and adult.
Inhalation entries store absorption type blocks (F, M, S) with infant and 1-year f1 values plus dose coefficients for infant, 1 year, 5 years, 10 years, 15 years, and adult.
Raw labels are preserved when the source table includes footnote markers or extraction artifacts attached to f1 values.
This file is structured to parallel the simplified workers JSON: ingestion and inhalation sit directly under each radionuclide.
